alertGroupCard.confirmMute:
This rule will no longer generate alerts on this site.
You can re-enable it in the site settings.

cookieConsent.text: This site uses session cookies to improve your experience and help us diagnose issues. No data is shared with third parties.

crawlProgress.sitemapBlocked: Firewall (WAF) detected — the sitemap could not be accessed. Only the homepage was analyzed.
crawlProgress.pagesSkipped: {count} pages skipped — activate billing to include them

mutedRules.title: Disabled rules
mutedRules.desc: These rules no longer generate alerts on this site. Re-enable them to monitor these issues again.

perfBadge.syntheticText: Taken by our crawler in lab conditions (one pass per crawl), not by your real visitors. The value varies from crawl to crawl — the card shows the latest measurement, the chart shows the variance over 30 days. Google ranks on field data (real users); INP cannot be measured synthetically.

perfChart.empty: No performance measurements for this page yet.
perfChart.lcpHint: Time before the main content is displayed. Good under 2.5 s. A Google ranking factor.
perfChart.clsHint: Measures whether the page shifts while loading (content jumping around). Good under 0.1. A Google ranking factor.
perfChart.ttfbHint: Time your server takes to respond. Good under 800 ms; a slow server slows down the whole page.
perfChart.weightHint: Total downloaded weight: HTML, JavaScript, CSS, images and fonts. Good under 1.6 MB, excessive beyond 5 MB (Lighthouse thresholds). A heavy page loads slowly, especially on mobile.

permissionsModal.title: Roles & permissions
permissionsModal.intro: Permissions are managed at two levels: {org} and {zone}.
permissionsModal.ownerDesc: Full access. Manages the organization, billing, sites and all zones.
permissionsModal.adminDesc: Manages the zone: edit, delete, invite members, configure the webhook, launch crawls, disable alert rules.
permissionsModal.memberDesc: Can launch crawls, view and resolve alerts.
permissionsModal.viewerDesc: Read-only. Sees pages and alerts without being able to act.
permissionsModal.note: An organization owner automatically has all rights on all zones.

treeDirectoryHeader.pagesInDir: {count} pages in this directory | {count} page in this directory | {count} pages in this directory

addSiteModal.title: Add a site
addSiteModal.ownership: I confirm that I own this site or have explicit permission to crawl it.

addZoneModal.pathRequired: At least one path is required
addZoneModal.confirmDelete: Delete this zone? This action is irreversible.
addZoneModal.nameExists: A zone with this name already exists

alertsList.emptyText: No alerts detected. Your site is healthy.

twoFactorSetup.desc: Protect your account with two-factor authentication (2FA).
twoFactorSetup.scanQr: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
twoFactorSetup.backupWarning: Save these backup codes somewhere safe. Each code can only be used once.

sites.emptyTextOwner: Add your first site and Seogard will watch over its technical SEO around the clock.
sites.emptyTextMember: No sites in this organization. Ask an owner to add one.
sites.heading: Your sites
sites.countMonitored: {n} sites monitored | {n} site monitored | {n} sites monitored

orgNew.title: Create an organization
orgNew.subtitle: Create an organization to collaborate with your team.

report.title: Report — {zone}
report.errorText: Try again in a moment. If the problem persists, check your permissions on this zone.
report.emptyText: This zone's report will appear here as soon as the first crawl completes.

schedule.title: Schedule — {zone}
schedule.subtitle: Schedule recurring crawls aligned with your release rhythm
schedule.denied: You do not have permission to access this page.
schedule.activationDesc: Your site ships every Thursday. The scheduled crawl runs Friday at 03:00 UTC to check nothing broke.
schedule.freqDailyDesc: Ideal for e-commerce sites with frequent updates.
schedule.freqWeeklyDesc: Follows the pace of weekly deploys.
schedule.freqBiweeklyDesc: For regular checks without daily monitoring.
schedule.freqMonthlyDesc: Covers monthly editorial or template changes.
schedule.utcHint: Crawls are triggered in UTC, regardless of your timezone.

members.title: Members — {zone}
members.subtitle: Manage roles specific to this zone
members.denied: You do not have permission to access this page.

billing.title: Billing
billing.heroDefault: Continuous SEO monitoring, billed per page.
billing.reassure3: You only pay for what is crawled
billing.how1: Only pages actually crawled during the month are billed
billing.how2: Re-running a crawl on the same zone costs nothing extra
billing.how3: Pages not crawled this month are not counted
billing.howExample: Example: a 300k-page site with 3 zones of 10k → you pay for 30k pages, i.e. {price30k} EUR excl. VAT/month. The next month you only crawl 10k → {price10k} EUR excl. VAT/month.
billing.invoicesSub: History and PDF receipts of your payments
billing.checkoutCancel: Activation cancelled. You can try again anytime.
billing.trialDaysLeft: Free trial — {n} days left. | Free trial — {n} day left. | Free trial — {n} days left.
billing.trialEnded: Your 14-day trial has ended. Activate billing to continue.
billing.billingActive: Billing active — {pages} pages monitored this month.
billing.subscriptionCanceled: Your subscription is cancelled. Reactivate billing to resume your crawls.
billing.paymentFailed: Your last payment failed. Update your payment method to avoid your crawls being suspended.
billing.subscriptionSuspended: Your subscription is suspended. Crawls are stopped.

webhook.title: Webhook — {zone}
webhook.subtitle: Launch a crawl on this zone on every deploy
webhook.denied: You do not have permission to access this page.
webhook.keyHint: The site API key is shared across all zones.
webhook.step1: POST triggers a crawl and returns a crawlId
webhook.step2: GET with ?crawlId=xxx returns the status and the verdict
webhook.step3: If pass: false (critical alerts) → exit 1 blocks the pipeline
webhook.strictDescription: The slightest warning or SEO regression fails the deploy. Ideal for pre-prod or demanding SEO teams.
webhook.standardRule: Blocks on missing meta, broken SSR, noindex...
webhook.standardDescription: Only severe regressions block: removed title/description, broken SSR, deindexed page. Warnings pass.
webhook.relaxedDescription: Tolerates a few isolated alerts, only blocks when an issue affects multiple pages. For large sites with noise.
webhook.regenModalText: The old key will be immediately invalidated. All your CI/CD pipelines will need to be updated.

orgSettings.title: Organization settings
orgSettings.trialDaysLeft: {n} days left | {n} day left | {n} days left
orgSettings.trialExpired: Your 14-day trial has ended. Activate billing to continue your crawls.
orgSettings.billingActive: Billing active — {pages} pages monitored this month.
orgSettings.urlsLabel: URLs to give your IT admin:
orgSettings.transferDesc: Promote a member to the owner role.
orgSettings.leaveDesc: Only possible if there is another owner.
orgSettings.deleteDesc: Irreversible. All sites and data will be deleted.

zonePages.wafSub: Our crawler could not access the sitemap. Only the homepage was analyzed.
zonePages.invalidHostnameTitle: Sitemap points to the wrong hostname
zonePages.invalidHostnameSub: Some sitemap URLs have a different hostname than the monitored site and are ignored by the crawl.
zonePages.noSitemapTitle: No sitemap found on this site
zonePages.noSitemapSub: Without a sitemap, orphan pages (with no internal links) and new pages can go unnoticed — including by search engines. Their update dates (lastmod) are not signaled either. Publishing a sitemap makes their discovery reliable.
zonePages.failedPagesTitle: {n} pages could not be analyzed on the last crawl | {n} page could not be analyzed on the last crawl | {n} pages could not be analyzed on the last crawl
zonePages.failedPagesSub: The server refused our crawler's connection (rejection or timeout). Most often, a firewall (Cloudflare, BitNinja...) is filtering our IP — allow it. Otherwise, check HTTPS access for these URLs.
zonePages.mutedRules: {n} rules disabled on this site. | {n} rule disabled on this site. | {n} rules disabled on this site.
zonePages.firstCrawlSub: {count} pages discovered via the sitemap. Launch a crawl to detect SEO regressions, performance issues and recommendations.
zonePages.emptyZone: No pages in this zone. Launch a crawl to get started.
zonePages.deleteModalWarning: This action is irreversible. All associated data will be deleted.
zonePages.crawlNoPermission: You do not have permission to launch a crawl.
zonePages.crawlSubscriptionRequired: A subscription is required to launch a crawl.

trialBanner.remaining: left on your free trial | left on your free trial | left on your free trial
trialBanner.subscribe: Subscribe now — your remaining trial days carry over
